name: list_projects
description: List all projects in the Linear workspace. Projects are used to group related issues and track progress toward a goal. Returns project names, descriptions, status, progress percentage, lead, target dates, and associated teams. Supports cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL query string to fetch projects.
parameters.example: { projects(first: 20) { nodes { id name state progress } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }

parameters.name: first
parameters.description: Number of projects to return (used inside GraphQL query).

body.query: { projects(first: 20) { nodes { id name description state progress startDate targetDate lead { name email } teams { nodes { name key } } issues { nodes { id identifier } } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }
